source_note: Keeper Rulebook Chapter 14: Monsters, Beasts, and Alien Gods (pp.294-343 / PDF idx 293-342). Each monster has characteristics, HP, armor, MOV, SAN loss, attacks, spells, and description. Section One: Mythos Monsters (pp.294-321). Section Two: Deities (pp.322-341). Section Three: Traditional Horrors (pp.344-355).

Byakhee.description: Star-steeds that can fly through space, ridden by sorcerers.

sensory_signature: a dry, ozone-sharp wind that should not move indoors
leather-and-bone wingbeats just beyond sight
hoof-scratches on stone that stop mid-stride
presentation.death_residue: A collapsed star-steed of brittle hide and hollow bone, already shedding dust as if gravity were optional.

sensory_signature: a low subterranean throb underfoot
warm, mucus-slick soil pushed up from nowhere
the taste of iron and wet clay in the air
presentation.death_residue: A vast, collapsing tunnel of rubbery flesh and grit, already sinking back into the earth.

Colour Out of Space.description: Alien life-force feeder that drains vitality.

sensory_signature: a color that has no name on familiar surfaces
plants and wood that feel warm and wrong to the touch
a faint, sweet rot with no source
presentation.death_residue: Only a bleached, brittle stain and a cold absence where vitality used to be — nothing like a corpse.

sensory_signature: a soft, continuous writhing under cloth or floorboards
the smell of damp earth and crushed insects
tiny wet sounds that pause when listened to
presentation.death_residue: A collapsing heap of worms and sodden robes that keep twitching after the shape is gone.

Dagon.description: Giant deep one deity, ruler of the deep ones.

sensory_signature: salt spray and deep-ocean cold indoors
a vast wet slap against distant pilings
scales glittering where no fish should be
presentation.death_residue: Not a corpse — a sudden withdrawal of the sea's attention, leaving only brine, broken stone, and an empty tide-line.

sensory_signature: a sweet, spoiled-milk reek of goat and sap
hoof-like impacts that do not match any animal gait
sticky black resin on bark and clothing
presentation.death_residue: A toppled mass of trunk-limbs and mouth-orifices leaking black sap that hardens into tar.

Deep One.description: Gilled humanoid fish-folk of the deep seas.

sensory_signature: brine and fish-oil on a dry floor
webbed prints that dry into salt crust
a wet, croaking breath from the dark
presentation.death_residue: A gilled, frog-like body already drying into a leathery, salt-crusted husk.

Deep One Hybrid.description: Innsmouth-tainted progeny of deep ones and humans.

sensory_signature: a persistent dampness on skin that never quite dries
eyes that catch light like a fish at night
a throaty swallow when speech should be clear
presentation.death_residue: A mostly-human corpse with wrong joints and gill-slits that look almost medical until examined closely.

sensory_signature: a grinding, distant tunnel-roar under the ground
sand and grit raining from a ceiling that should be solid
a sulfuric, worm-cast stench
presentation.death_residue: An impossible length of segmented flesh collapsing into a trench of acid-etched earth.

Dimensional Shambler.description: Hairy other-dimensional creature that can phase between worlds.

sensory_signature: air that folds like cloth at the edge of vision
a brief, hair-raising silence as sound skips a beat
coarse fur-smell with no animal present
presentation.death_residue: A half-phased carcass that flickers between here and elsewhere before settling as empty, scorched air.

Flying Polyp.description: Terrors from below that control wind and weather.

sensory_signature: a wind that pushes against closed windows
a whistling vacuum-note that hurts the ears
grit and dust swirling in a room with no draft
presentation.death_residue: A collapsing knot of semi-visible polyps that shred into abrasive wind and leave scored stone.

sensory_signature: black, oily sheen on stone that moves when not watched
a cold, tar-like smell
footsteps that stick and then release with a wet pop
presentation.death_residue: A spreading puddle of black protoplasm that hardens into brittle, glassy flakes.

sensory_signature: hoof-clatter in a place with no livestock
a carnivore's breath, hot and sour
pale, rubbery skin glimpsed in torchlight
presentation.death_residue: A pale, hoofed carcass with too-long limbs, already stiffening into a cave-beast shape.

Ghoul.description: Corpse-eating humanoid creatures that live in crypts.

sensory_signature: grave-dirt and sweet decay under floorboards
claw-marks on coffin wood that face the wrong way
a wet chewing sound from below
presentation.death_residue: A rubbery, canine-jawed humanoid body reeking of old graves, nails packed with cemetery soil.

Gnorri.source_note: Not in core rulebook Ch.14; from Dreamlands/supplement source.

sensory_signature: cold seawater dripping where no tide reaches
a soft flipper-slap on stone
kelp and seal-musk in a closed room
presentation.death_residue: A pinniped-like body with too-human hands, already cooling into a salt-wet heap.

Gnoph-Keh.description: Hairy horned predators of the Arctic.

sensory_signature: a sudden arctic cold indoors
ice crystals forming on metal without frost outside
a horn-scrape against timber
presentation.death_residue: A shaggy, horned carcass rimed with ice that melts into foul meltwater.

Great Race of Yith.description: Time-traveling cone-shaped beings that swap minds.

sensory_signature: a dry, library-dust scent with no books nearby
a cone-shaped shadow that does not match any furniture
a soft clicking of claws on stone in careful rhythm
presentation.death_residue: A toppled cone-body of rubbery flesh and claws; the eyes already look vacated, as if the mind left first.

Hound of Tindalos.description: Angular time-predators that hunt through angles.

sensory_signature: blue ichor beading at sharp corners
a smell of ozone and old blood from angles
a howl that arrives before the sound should
presentation.death_residue: Angular, lean remains that seem to sink into the nearest corner, leaving only blue-stained geometry.

Hunting Horror.description: Great viperine flyers summoned by Nyarlathotep.

sensory_signature: a viperine hiss from overhead darkness
a shadow that coils independently of its caster
a burnt-hair stench on a cold wind
presentation.death_residue: A great serpentine flyer collapsing into smoking, blackened coils that flake into ash.

sensory_signature: a crab-like clicking just outside the light
a fungal, pinkish dust on windowsills
a buzzing speech that is almost words
presentation.death_residue: A crustacean-fungus heap that dissolves into pinkish dust and brittle shell fragments.

Nightgaunt.description: Faceless bat-winged humanoids that tickle victims.

sensory_signature: a soft leather wingbeat with no birdcall
cold, tickling fingers along the ribs
a faceless silhouette against the moon
presentation.death_residue: A rubbery, bat-winged body with a smooth blank where a face should be, already going slack.

Serpent Person.description: Reptilian sorcerers who ruled prehistoric Earth.

sensory_signature: a dry, shed-skin rustle behind the walls
a faint musk of reptiles in a heated room
a forked-tongue flicker at the edge of speech
presentation.death_residue: A scaled humanoid corpse, eyes filmed, with a sorcerer's tools still clutched in cooling claws.

Shantak.description: Winged elephantine mounts found in the Dreamlands.

sensory_signature: elephantine wingbeats that shake loose plaster
a rank, bird-and-beast musk from the sky
scales scraping slate roofs
presentation.death_residue: A vast winged mount of scale and hide, already too heavy for the dream-logic that kept it aloft.

Shoggoth.description: Shape-shifting protoplasmic servants created by the Elder Things.

sensory_signature: a bubbling, black wetness that reflects too many eyes
a cold protoplasmic smell like spoiled seawater
surfaces that ripple as if remembering shapes
presentation.death_residue: A collapsing ocean of eyes and mouths that hardens into a foul, glassy sludge.

sensory_signature: a green, submarine dampness in dry air
tentacle-shadows that do not match any light source
a pressure in the ears as if descending too deep
presentation.death_residue: An octopoid satrap-body that softens into greenish, tidal slime rather than lying like a beast.

Zoog.description: Small carnivorous mammals of the Dreamlands enchanted wood.
Zoog.source_note: Not in core rulebook Ch.14; from Dreamlands/supplement source.

sensory_signature: tiny claw-scratches in the woodwork
a chittering just under the floor
a sharp, woodland musk in a city room
presentation.death_residue: A small, sharp-toothed mammal body, almost ordinary until the wrong number of digits is counted.

Cthulhu.description: High priest of the Great Old Ones, slumbering in Rlyeh.

sensory_signature: a green, dreaming pressure behind the eyes
the smell of deep ocean and ancient stone
geometry that refuses to stay the same size
presentation.death_residue: Not death — a sudden dispersal into green mist and impossible angles, as if the presence were only borrowed.

Azathoth.description: Blind idiot god at the center of the universe.

sensory_signature: a mindless piping that seems to come from inside the skull
a blind, idiotic heat with no fire
space itself vibrating like a drumskin
presentation.death_residue: Nothing that can die remains — only a collapsing absence and the echo of piping that should not stop.

Hastur.description: The Unspeakable One, Lord of Carcosa, Master of the Yellow Sign.

sensory_signature: a yellow stain that spreads on clean cloth
a theatrical, distant applause with no audience
the smell of old stage dust and lake water
presentation.death_residue: No corpse — the yellow presence thins into fog and torn scenery, as if a play were struck.

Nyarlathotep.description: Crawling Chaos, messenger of the Outer Gods.

sensory_signature: a smile that arrives before the face does
the smell of hot metal and carnival grease
footsteps that match no one in the room
presentation.death_residue: A mask, a coat, or a shape collapses into crawling darkness — the messenger is gone, not slain.

Shub-Niggurath.description: Black Goat of the Woods, fertility deity.

sensory_signature: a fertile, goatish reek of milk and blood
too many hoofbeats in the undergrowth
black blossoms opening where no plant should grow
presentation.death_residue: A fertility-presence unmade into black sap, hoofprints, and a sudden sterile quiet — not a body.

Yog-Sothoth.description: The Lurker at the Threshold, gate and key.

sensory_signature: iridescent spheres overlapping at the edge of sight
a gate-like pressure in doorways that should be ordinary
the smell of ozone and distant rain that never falls
presentation.death_residue: The spheres thin and the threshold closes; what remains is empty air and a lingering sense of elsewhere.

Werewolf.description: Traditional horror: lycanthrope that transforms at the full moon.

sensory_signature: a wet-dog musk under human cologne
claw-gouges too high for any dog
a howl that starts as a human sob
presentation.death_residue: A body caught mid-change — fur, torn clothing, and a face that is neither fully beast nor fully human.

sensory_signature: a cold draft that smells of old blood
a shadow that does not quite match its owner
dust on a mirror that should have been cleaned
presentation.death_residue: A corpse that ages decades in moments, or collapses into dust and stained clothing.

Ghost.description: Traditional horror: spirit of the dead.

sensory_signature: a sudden drop in temperature with no draft
the smell of a perfume no living person wears
footsteps on stairs that stop mid-flight
presentation.death_residue: No body — only a cold spot, a settled silence, and objects left slightly out of place.

sensory_signature: a sweet, embalming-fluid rot
shuffling steps that never hurry
cold, clammy skin that does not bleed right
presentation.death_residue: A reanimated corpse that finally stays down — limp, gray, and already halfway to ordinary death.

Walter Corbitt.description: The Haunting: undead sorcerer, animating his own corpse.

sensory_signature: a cellar-damp reek of old blood and mold
scratching inside the walls that answers knocks
a corpse-cold draft from under a sealed door
presentation.death_residue: An undead sorcerer's body finally still — desiccated flesh, ritual scars, and eyes that no longer track.
